name: net.payflowagent/mcp
description: Free & pay-per-call (x402/USDC) risk & momentum scores for nad.fun tokens on Monad.

environmentVariables.name: X402_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of a dedicated payer wallet (Base, USDC) used to auto-pay x402 calls. Without it, only the free tool works.

environmentVariables.name: PAYFLOWAGENT_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the PayFlowAgent service (default https://payflowagent.net).

environmentVariables.name: X402_BUYER_RPC
environmentVariables.description: Optional payment RPC endpoint (Base mainnet by default).
